note: As-built set for v0.4.0 (report ⑤, re-run after UAT round 1). Flow = the shipped interaction/data flow incl. the UAT additions (subgraph group-drag + auto-contain, edge-endpoint pinning) alongside resize/drag → perimeter re-anchor → re-route → persist, export, reset. Sequence = the five runtime interactions (resize+persist, subgraph group-drag/auto-contain, edge-pin, Save SVG/PNG, reset). Class = the changed types (EdgeAnchor/EdgePorts +from/to, geometry subgraphBox/computeSubgraphBoxes + overrides, LayoutData.anchors, RoutedEdge.ports 0.3.0 breaking shape, RuntimeHandle, DeferredHandle delegation). No activity/use-case kind — no new state machine, and the flow chart already carries the user-capability signal. No charts/before/ baseline existed at plan time, so the bundle has no before set.

diagrams.title: As-built flow: select → resize/drag → perimeter re-anchor → re-route → persist/export/reset
As-built sequence: resize → re-anchor → persist · export SVG/PNG · reset layout
